prompt: The following VCF record shows genotypes for three samples. One sample appears to have a genotype inconsistent with its AD values. Identify which sample and explain the inconsistency.
context:
#CHROM	POS	ID	REF	ALT	QUAL	FILTER	INFO	FORMAT	IRIS_C01	IRIS_C02	IRIS_C03
chr09	8192034	.	G	A	4210	PASS	AF=0.31;AN=6020	GT:GQ:DP:AD	0/0:92:30:30,0	0/1:78:28:14,14	1/1:65:25:18,7
correct_answer: IRIS_C03 is inconsistent. It has GT=1/1 (homozygous alternate) but AD=18,7 shows 18 reads supporting the reference allele and only 7 supporting the alternate. A true 1/1 genotype should have nearly all reads supporting the alternate allele (AD ~ 0,25). This suggests a genotyping error -- the sample is more likely heterozygous (0/1) or homozygous reference (0/0) based on the read evidence.
rubric: Must identify IRIS_C03 as inconsistent. Must explain that 1/1 should have most reads supporting ALT but AD shows majority REF reads. Must suggest the call is likely incorrect.
notes: Tests ability to cross-check GT against AD for quality assessment. This is a common QC check.
